# Godot patches for picoquic

Patches against [private-octopus/picoquic](https://github.com/private-octopus/picoquic) master.

## Patch list

### 0001-add-buffer-based-private-key-loading.patch

**Purpose**: Load TLS private keys from PEM buffers without file I/O.

Upstream picoquic only supports loading private keys from file paths via
`picoquic_set_private_key_from_file`. Godot needs to load keys from
in-memory PEM buffers (generated by `Crypto::generate_rsa` or embedded
as constants) to avoid temp file dependency.

**Changes** (5 files, ~100 lines added):

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `picoquic/picoquic_crypto_provider_api.h` | Rename `picoquic_set_tls_key_provider_t` → `picoquic_set_private_key_from_buffer_t`; add `picoquic_register_private_key_from_buffer_fn` declaration |
| `picoquic/tls_api.c` | Add `picoquic_set_private_key_from_buffer_fn` global; implement `picoquic_set_tls_key(quic, data, len)` public API; register/zero in init/cleanup |
| `picoquic/picoquic_mbedtls.c` | Register `ptls_mbedtls_load_private_key_from_buffer` in the mbedtls provider load |
| `picoquic_mbedtls/ptls_mbedtls.h` | Declare `ptls_mbedtls_load_private_key_from_buffer` |
| `picoquic_mbedtls/ptls_mbedtls_sign.c` | Implement `ptls_mbedtls_load_private_key_from_buffer` — mirrors file-based loader but takes `(ctx, data, len)` instead of a file path |

**Key convention**: `len` is content length WITHOUT the null terminator.
`ptls_mbedtls_get_der_key` checks `key[keylen] == '\0'` for PEM
null-termination, so passing `strlen(pem)` (not `strlen+1`) is correct.

**Applies to**: picoquic master as of 2026-04-15.

### 0002-godot-fixes.patch

**Purpose**: Assorted Godot compatibility fixes: ECDSA signing, Windows/Android
portability, chain-head leak, dual-stack socket binding, and minor cleanups.

**Changes** (13 files, +224 / -33):

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `picoquic_mbedtls/ptls_mbedtls_sign.c` | Fix ECDSA DER signature encoding (leading 0x00 pad on r/s when high bit set); fix chain_head cert context leak in verifier |
| `picoquic_mbedtls/ptls_mbedtls.h` | Declare helpers added by signing fix |
| `picoquic/tls_api.c` | Buffer-based key loading API (also covered by 0001) |
| `picoquic/picoquic_crypto_provider_api.h` | Provider API rename (also covered by 0001) |
| `picoquic/picoquic_mbedtls.c` | Register buffer key provider (also covered by 0001) |
| `picoquic/ech.c` | Remove unused variable warning |
| `picoquic/picoquic.h` | Add `picoquic_set_tls_key` declaration |
| `picoquic/picosocks.h` | Guard `IN6_IS_ADDR_*` macros for MinGW |
| `picoquic/quicctx.c` | Fix dual-stack `AF_UNSPEC` socket binding for loopback server |
| `picoquic/sockloop.c` | Dual-stack socket loop fixes |
| `picoquic/util.c` | Android `clock_gettime` compat (`__ANDROID__` guard) |
| `picoquic/wincompat.h` | MinGW IN6_* multiple-definition guard |
| `picoquic/winsockloop.c` | MinGW `wintimeofday` shim |

**Applies to**: picoquic commit `790e973b1aa5625fd2da99f92ce02cb3c616b5ec` (2026-04-15).

## Applying patches

```bash
cd thirdparty/picoquic
patch -p1 < godot_patches/0001-add-buffer-based-private-key-loading.patch
patch -p1 < godot_patches/0002-godot-fixes.patch
```

## Upstream status

Not yet submitted upstream. The buffer-key-loading API (0001) follows
picoquic's existing provider pattern and should be a straightforward
upstream contribution. The fixes in 0002 are candidates for individual
upstream PRs once isolated from Godot-specific context.
